grid.targetGrid: centered grid area inside the 16:9 canvas; exact rows and columns declared here
grid.targetCell: one bust portrait per cell, generous padding, crop-safe

style: Stylized fantasy merchant RPG portrait, polished hand-painted game UI art, readable face, expressive eyes, clear silhouette, bust portrait from chest up, three-quarter view or front-facing, warm painterly lighting, crisp edges, premium collectible NPC portrait, not photo-realistic, not gritty realism, not anime, not modern clothing, no text, no labels, no UI frame, no watermark.
sheetPrompt: Create one sprite-sheet style portrait board containing exactly the listed character expression portraits. Use the declared strict grid. Every grid cell must contain exactly one centered bust portrait and must stay visually separated from neighboring cells with empty padding. Use the provided slot order exactly, reading left to right across each row, then top to bottom. Do not reorder, skip, merge, duplicate, or rename any slot. Use a solid pure #00FF00 green background. Do not add visible grid lines, numbers, labels, captions, letters, watermarks, UI frames, boxes, or shadows that cross cells. Each portrait must preserve its character identity anchors exactly. Expression images for the same character must look like the same person with only the expression and acting changed. Characters must be visually distinct from one another by silhouette, face shape, age, body type, clothing, profession props, palette, and posture. Use the highest available resolution for the 16:9 canvas.
